name: providedEventRef
title: providedEventRef
description: References a provided event endpoint, which means a specific combination of consumer and provider for a service event on provider side.

parameters.name: Event
parameters.description: Event of a service, determining the data type of the object.

row: Name Name of the provided endpoint
Path Full path of the provided endpoint (including namespaces)
ConsumerIndex Index of the consumer. Note that the index may change if consumers are added or removed.
ProviderIndex Index of the provider. Note that the index may change if providers are added or removed.

SubscriptionState State of the event subscription: Unavailable: there’s no connection between consumer and provider, the event cannot be subscribed. Available: the event can be subscribed, but currently is not subscribed. Subscribed: the event is subscribed.
